channel.title: FundedYouth Community App updates
channel.description: The latest official changelogs and software updates across the entire FundedYouth technical ecosystem.

item.title: [Public Site] 🧰 New /apps Page: Tiny Tools & Course Apps
item.description:
Introducing a new **/apps** page on the public site. 🎉
### What's New * **🔗 One place for everything**: The page collects links to the tiny apps and tools used across FundedYouth courses and more. * **🚀 Quick access**: Jump straight to a course tool without hunting for the link.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 📊 Storefront POS: View Student Progress & Badges Earned
item.description:
The **Storefront POS** now gives you a quick window into each student's journey. 🎉
### What's New * **📈 View Progress**: See a student's course progress right from the POS. * **🏅 Badges Earned**: Check which badges a student has earned without leaving the POS.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 🚦 Pathways: Set a Pathway to Live or Draft
item.description:
Pathways now have a **mode** so you can work on them before they go public.
### What Changed * **🟢 Live or Draft**: A pathway can now be set to **Live** or **Draft**, giving you control over what's visible while you build.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 📂 Accounts > Progress: Expand a Course to See Student Status
item.description:
Tracking how a class is doing is now much easier. 🎉
### What's New * **🔽 Expandable Courses**: Clicking a course expands the students in the class. * **🚦 Status at a Glance**: Each student shows their status — **Not Started**, **In Progress**, or **Completed**.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 🗂️ Admin Menu: Students Is Now “Accounts”
item.description:
A small navigation tidy-up in the Admin Portal.
### What Changed * **✏️ Renamed**: **Students > Students** is now **Accounts**. * **⬆️ Moved Up**: **Accounts** now sits at the top of the sub-menu for quicker access.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 🏅 Earn Badges for Completing Courses
item.description:
Gamification is here! We've created brand-new **graphical badges** and added them to the portal. 🎉
### How It Works * **🎓 Complete a Course, Earn a Badge**: Finish a course and a shiny new badge is yours. * **🏆 Show Off Your Progress**: Collect badges as you work your way through our courses.
This feature is **live now** — start earning! 🚀
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 🗂️ New Admin Page: Event Management
item.description:
A brand-new **Event Management** page in the Admin Portal brings everything you need to run an event into one place. 🎉
### What You Can Do * **📋 See Every Event**: List all current and upcoming events at a glance. * **👥 View Registered Students**: See exactly who's signed up for each event. * **✅ Check Students In**: Check a student in to an event when they arrive. * **🏁 Mark as Completed**: Set a student as completed once they've finished. * **🚫 Handle No-Shows**: Remove a student from the event if they don't show up. * **🏅 Award Badges**: Select a student and award a badge right from the event.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 🛠️ Admin Portal: Synced Logs, POS Shortcuts & Cleaner Navigation
item.description:
We've made the Admin Portal smoother to manage day-to-day, from shared logs to a tidier menu.
### Fixed: Notification Syncing * **🔄 No More Duplicates**: Fixed an internal error in notification syncing. **Notifications**, the **Audit Log**, and the **Error Log** no longer duplicate for every admin. When one admin marks an item as **read** or **completed**, it's marked that way for all admins — so no one gets buried under duplicate alerts and logs.
### POS Shortcuts * **🎓 Faster Enrollment**: The **Enroll a Student** action on the Dashboard now takes you straight to the **Storefront POS**. * **📆 Calendar View**: Added a **calendar view** in the POS for Courses and Events — now including the **Course ID**.
### Cleaner Navigation * **🧭 Rearranged Menu**: **Storefront POS** and **Events Manager** now sit directly under the Dashboard, with a divider after Events Manager for clear separation. * **👤 All Users**: **User Management** has been renamed **All Users** and moved to the bottom of the menu.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 📝 Simpler Sign-Up: Account Types & One Combined Agreement
item.description:
We've streamlined how you create your account and sign agreements — so getting started is quicker and clearer! 🎉
### Choose Your Account Type * **👤 Personal Account**: Register as a single user. * **👨‍👩‍👧 Multi-Child Account**: Register as a parent or guardian for your children. For each child, we automatically create a custom email from your address and the student's name — so you still receive every confirmation. Example: `<your-email>+<student-name>@example.com`.
### One Agreement Instead of Three * **📄 Combined Agreement**: We merged the **General**, **Student**, and **Subscription** agreements into one. Now the only things you sign at registration are the **parental agreement** and this **new combined agreement** — which unlocks the entire portal, including the student menus. * **✅ Already Signed?**: If you previously signed all three agreements, you've been **automatically signed** to the new one — nothing to do.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] ☀️ New Summer Class Schedule
item.description:
Our summer schedule is here — with **three one-hour classes every day**! 🌞
### Daily Class Times * **1:00 – 2:00 PM** * **2:00 – 3:00 PM** * **3:00 – 4:00 PM**
Running **Monday through Friday**.
### Rotating Courses by Day Entry-level courses are assigned by day — **Monday: 3DP1**, **Tuesday: 3DP2**, **Wednesday: 3DM1**, **Thursday: CDE1**. The Monday/Tuesday and Wednesday course days **alternate each week**, so check your portal calendar for the current week's lineup.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 🛠️ Admin Portal: Sessions Databank & Events Upgrades
item.description:
We've polished the **Sessions** tools in the Admin Portal to make linking classes and events faster and clearer.
### Databank Card View * **🧹 Simplified Cards**: A cleaner card view that surfaces the key information at a glance. * **🔗 Link Class to Event**: New field for linking a class directly to its event. * **🆔 Cleaner Layout**: Removed the ID prefix from the Event Name. The **ID pill** now sits under the description, followed by the category, then the **linked course** and **linked class**. * **⚡ Auto-Assign Event ID**: A new button auto-assigns the Event ID to the linked Class ID, plus an optional **Auto-Assign Event ID** toggle when a class is linked to an event. * **❗ Required Field**: Event ID is now a required field.
### Events: From Template * **🔎 Richer Search**: The **From Template** search popup now includes **Event ID**, **Course ID**, and **Class ID**.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Public Site] 🔗 Changelog Link Added to the Footer
item.description: Finding out what we're building just got easier! We've added a link to our **Changelog** (a Fun Labs project) right in the **site footer** — so the latest updates are always one click away.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Public Site] 📅 Updated Summer Class Schedule
item.description:
We've updated our weekly summer class schedule based on the most common requests we've been hearing from you! 🌞
### What Changed * **🕐 New Hours**: Classes now run **1:00 – 4:00 PM, Monday through Thursday**. * **📚 All Four Classes Weekly**: All four entry-level classes are now available **every week**.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Docs] 📄 Agreements Combined: The Portal Member Agreement
item.description:
We've combined three separate agreements — **General**, **Student**, and **Subscription** — into a single **Portal Member Agreement**, streamlining the account creation process.
### What This Means * **📝 One Agreement**: A single Portal Member Agreement replaces the previous three. * **⚡ Faster Sign-Up**: Fewer documents to read and sign means a quicker, simpler registration.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 🏪 Storefront POS: In-Person Account Creation & Sign-Ups
item.description:
The **Storefront POS** in the Admin Portal just got a major upgrade — making it possible to get members fully set up in person! 🎉
### What's New * **👤 Built-In Account Creation**: The new account creation process is now integrated right into the POS. Register a **single user** or sign up as a **parent or guardian** for a child — complete with our **concatenated email** feature. * **✍️ Sign Agreements In Person**: All required agreements can now be signed on the spot at the storefront.
### The Big Win **98% of account creation and class registration** can now happen entirely through the Storefront POS. The only thing left for the user to do is click the **email confirmations** — one to confirm their new account, and the **parental agreement** for COPPA compliance.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] ✨ Refreshed Account Creation & Registration
item.description:
We've updated the **landing page** to make creating an account and getting registered smoother than ever! 🎉
### What Changed * **🙌 Clearer Account Creation**: A cleaner, more intuitive sign-up flow right from the landing page. * **📝 Streamlined Registration**: We tidied up the registration process so getting started takes fewer steps and less guesswork.
### Why It Matters New members can go from landing on the page to fully registered faster and with less friction.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 📅 User Registration V2
item.description:
We've cleaned up class registration and moved everything into the **Sessions Menu** — so signing up for your courses and classes is simpler than ever! 🎉
### How It Works * **🎯 Pick a Course**: Select **Available Courses** to join a course. This reveals the upcoming classes available for that course. * **🗓️ Register for Same-Day Classes**: You can now register for two class sessions on the same day! Just sign up for **Class A** at, say, 4 PM and **Class B** at 5 PM (or any later time). That way you complete the course classes in the correct order.
### Smart Prerequisites Available Courses only show up once you **meet the prerequisites**. So if you haven't finished **Course A**, you won't be able to join **Course B** or its class sessions — it stays hidden on your portal calendar until you're ready.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Fun Labs] 🚀 Introducing the App Launcher
item.description:
Say hello to the **App Launcher** — a friendly home base for the makerspace computers that puts everything one click away! 🧪
### What Is It? The App Launcher is a shortcut landing page that runs **locally on the makerspace computers**. Instead of hunting through bookmarks and desktop icons, you get one tidy launchpad with cards for every app and service you need.
### What's On the Launchpad * **🛠️ FundedYouth Apps**: Quick-launch cards for the apps we build in-house. * **🔌 Services We Use**: Handy shortcuts to the third-party tools and services that power the makerspace.
### Why It's Handy Walk up to any makerspace computer and get to work in seconds — no more digging for the right link.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] 🛒 POS Integration: Buy, Subscribe & Enroll In Person
item.description:
Our new **Point of Sale (POS) integration** brings the full power of the User Portal to the front desk — so members can get set up in person, no laptop required! 🎉
### What's New * **💰 Buy FYBIT Credits**: Purchase FYBIT Credits right at the POS and start using them on the spot. * **🎟️ Manage Memberships**: Sign up for and handle membership subscriptions in person, handled directly through the POS. * **📚 Enroll On the Spot**: Register students for **courses, workshops, and class sessions** without leaving the counter.
### Why It Matters Whether you're joining at an event or stopping by onsite, getting started is now faster and easier than ever — buy credits, pick a membership, and lock in your classes all in one place.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [The Vault] New App in Development
item.description:
🚀 Something exciting is brewing! We're building a brand-new in-house file server exclusively for active members — and we're calling it **The Vault**.
### What is The Vault? The Vault is your members-only treasure chest of premium resources, available **onsite for active members only**. Think custom 3D models, exclusive assets, and limited edition prints you won't find anywhere else.
### What to Expect * **🎨 Custom 3D Models**: A curated, ever-growing library built just for our community. * **💎 Limited Edition Prints**: Exclusive drops reserved for active members — and more on the way. * **🔒 Members-Only Access**: Premium resources available exclusively onsite.
This project is still in **early development**, and we're just getting started. 📬 **Subscribe to the feed** to be the first to know as The Vault takes shape!
### Stay in the Loop Don't miss a single drop! [**Sign up for our newsletter**](https://fundedyouth.org/contact) to get the latest updates delivered straight to your inbox.
And give us a follow for behind-the-scenes sneak peeks and announcements: * 📸 **Instagram**: [@FundedYouth](https://www.instagram.com/FundedYouth/) * 👍 **Facebook**: [FundedYouth](https://www.facebook.com/FundedYouth)
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Curriculum] Cura Slicer Basics - New Course Model (3DP1)
item.description:
Cura Slicer Basics is now split into two **1-hour sessions**, giving students room to learn the tool and then put it to work on a realistic job.
### Session 1: Hands-On Slicer Lesson Our existing hands-on lesson on how to use the **Ultimaker Cura Slicer** application. Students get comfortable navigating the software and preparing a model to print.
### Session 2: Challenges & Estimating This new session introduces real-world challenges and provides students with a **template for producing an estimate**. The instructor plays the role of a client or customer and makes three requests. For each one, the student will: 1. **Find a model** that fits the request. 2. **Get the customer's approval** on the model. 3. **Write up the estimate** using the provided template. 4. **Confirm the price** with the customer. 5. **Print the file**.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Curriculum] New Course: Bambu Studio Basics (3DP2)
item.description:
A brand-new course has landed! **Bambu Studio Basics (3DP2)** is here, and just like 3DP1, it's split into two fun **1-hour sessions**. 🎉
*Heads up: You'll need to finish the **3DP1 course** first before jumping into this one!*
### Session 1: Learning the Tools Get hands-on with the **Bambu Studio** app! This first class walks you through all the basic tools so you feel comfortable getting your models ready to print.
### Session 2: Making a Cost Estimate Want to sell your prints? This class teaches you how to make a real cost estimate through three fun challenges. The instructor plays the role of a client and asks for three different items. For each one, you'll: 1. **Find something** the customer wants. 2. **Produce an estimate** for the job. 3. **Get the customer's confirmation**. 4. **Take the payment**. 5. **Print the product**. 6. **Present it** to the customer.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Curriculum] Updated Course: TinkerCAD 3D Modeling (3DM1)
item.description:
We've leveled up our **TinkerCAD 3D Modeling (3DM1)** course! 🎉 It now includes a brand-new **Cost Estimate document** to help students learn how to figure out the time and cost of making 3D models.
*Good news: there are **no prerequisites** for this course — anyone can jump right in!*
### How It Works The course is split into two **1-hour sessions**, and it's **100% hands-on**. Every lesson builds on the one before it, and you'll always be modeling something brand-new!
### What You'll Do * **🛠️ Two Modeling Lessons Per Class**: Each session is packed with two hands-on modeling lessons. * **📐 Learn to Estimate**: Discover how to calculate the time and cost to produce your 3D models. * **🚀 Build As You Go**: Each lesson grows your skills so you keep getting better and better.
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Curriculum] 💻 New Course: Coding with SpriteLab (CDE1)
item.description:
Get ready to code! **Coding with SpriteLab (CDE1)** by Code.org is our newest course — and it's included in your membership at **no extra charge**! 🎉
### What to Expect This is a fun, three-part course made up of three **1-hour sessions**. It covers all the basic terminology and skills to get you ready for hands-on challenges and real-world scenarios.
### Where It Takes You This course is your launchpad! It prepares you for bigger adventures in: * **🌐 Web App Development** * **📡 IoT (Internet of Things)** * **🔌 Embedded Design** * **✨ And so much more!**
Start here and build the foundation for an awesome coding journey!
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [User Portal] User Portal is Live
item.description:
The User Portal is officially live, and you can sign up to become a member today! Getting started is quick and easy.
### How to Get Started * **Create an account**: Sign up and confirm your email to unlock the portal. * **Buy credits & subscribe**: Grab some credits and pick your membership. * **Use your benefits**: Join the free classes that come with the basic membership. * **Spend your FYBIT credits**: Trade them for filament or kick off a 3D print!
### Need a Little Help? * **Watch our videos**: Follow along with our [YouTube tutorials](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E8rDILmQb6M&list=PLqD3DJZs3fm57yyM-hkpIi_3VOyoYxDxx). * **Read the guide**: Check out our [Getting Started page](https://fundedyouth.org/get-started).
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Public Site] 🚀 A Brand-New Public Site!
item.description:
We gave our **Public Site** a complete makeover from top to bottom! 🎨
### What's New * **✨ Fresh Design**: A clean, modern look that's easier and more fun to use. * **🎯 New Focus**: We're shining a spotlight on the [**FundedYouth Portal**](https://portal.fundedyouth.org), our STEM classes, and all the awesome services we offer. * **📅 Live Schedule**: A brand-new live schedule connected right to the Portal, so you always know what's happening next.
### Become a Member Our new site makes it super easy to **join and unlock great benefits**. Come explore everything FundedYouth has to offer!
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Docs] 📖 A Fresh New Look for Our Docs!
item.description:
We gave [**docs.fundedyouth.org**](https://docs.fundedyouth.org) a brand-new look and feel to make finding answers easier than ever! ✨
### What's New * **🧭 Easier Navigation**: We split everything into clear sections so you can find what you need fast — **Getting Started**, **FYBIT Credits**, **Courses**, **Portal**, **Legal**, and **Technical Details**. * **🎨 Prettier Courses Pages**: We added custom formatting to the Courses pages, so they're cleaner and more fun to read.
### Take a Look Come explore the new and improved docs — everything you need to know, all in one tidy place!
item.author: Ryan Jones

item.title: [Fun Labs] 🎉 The Changelog App is Live!
item.description:
Say hello to our brand-new **Changelog App** — your one-stop spot to see everything FundedYouth is building! 🚀
### What You Can Do * **🔍 See the Latest**: Browse all our newest changes, fixes, and projects in one place. * **📬 Subscribe to the Feed**: Never miss an update — follow along with our RSS feed. * **👋 Follow Us**: Stay connected on social media or sign up to get updates by email.
### Stay in the Loop This is your window into everything we're working on. Check back often to see what's new!
item.author: Ryan Jones
